caption: Two men are sitting in a room, positioned in front of a television screen. The man on the left wears a grey-green t-shirt and has a neutral facial expression. The man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace; he has his hand near his chin, appearing thoughtful or skeptical. Behind them, a television displays a video within a video, showing a dark scene with a blue light and a person. Above the men, glowing yellow text reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". In the background, a shelf holds numerous DVDs or CDs, and a small decorative object is visible to the far left. Across the sequence of frames, the men remain largely stationary, with only slight shifts in their facial expressions and postures as they watch the screen. The setting and lighting remain constant throughout the clip.
